name: Kombi Tickets – Eswatini
desc: A full‑stack web app for booking kombi (minibus) tickets in Eswatini. Features interactive map, real‑time seat selection, QR code tickets, and driver scanner.

name: HomewareOnTap E-commerce
desc: Full-stack e-commerce platform with admin dashboard, customer portal, and payment integration.

name: Mlungisi Rentals
desc: Rental property website with listings, booking system, and user authentication.

name: CFCI Church Website
desc: Church management system with member portal, event management, and donation system.

name: Hardware Shop REST API
desc: Java RESTful API for inventory management using JAX-RS and MySQL.

name: Umsebent wemaswatii
desc: Local services marketplace for Eswatini with mobile money integration.

name: EDSA Website
desc: Website for Eswatini Down Syndrome Association with blog and donation system.
